chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3755 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For Katcha Peshi 31.01.2018. Mr. Khadim Hussain Soomro, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. alongwith ASI Mian Bux, I.O of Crime No.237/2017 of P.S B-Section Nawabshah. Mr. Abdul Jabbar Arain, Advocate, has filed vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.1, who is also present, alongwith written reply / objections to this petition as well as he has filed an application for meeting of petitioner No.1 with her father. All the documents are taken on record and copies whereof supplied to the counsel for the petitioners. Learned A.A.G has filed comments of respondents No.2 to 4; taken on record and copies whereof supplied to the learned Counsel for the petitioner. It appears from the record that on 18.12.2017 petitioner No.1 alongwith petitioner No.2 appeared before the Court and petitioner No.1 Mst. Rana Kinza has stated that she had married with the man of her choice namely Iftikhar Ahmed, the petitioner No.2 in this petition, under valid nikahnama and before execution of marriage she also executed an affidavit of freewill stating therein that nobody has kidnapped / abducted her and she has married with petitioner No.2 according to her own choice. The I.O of the case is present and submits that he has already submitted a report under section 173, Cr.P.C before learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-II, Nawabshah disposing of the F.I.R. bearing Crime No.237/2017 of P.S B-Section Nawabshah in “C” class, which is pending adjudication before the said Magistrate. Learned Counsel for the parties present in court seek disposal of this petition if appropriate directions are given to petitioner No.1 Mst.

The I.O of the case is present and submits that he has already submitted a report under section 173, Cr.P.C before learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-II, Nawabshah disposing of the F.I.R. bearing Crime No.237/2017 of P.S B-Section Nawabshah in “C” class, which is pending adjudication before the said Magistrate. Learned Counsel for the parties present in court seek disposal of this petition if appropriate directions are given to petitioner No.1 Mst. Rana Kinza to appear before the learned Magistrate for recording her statement. In view of above, this petition stands disposed of with direction to Petitioner No.1 Mst. Rana Kinza to appear before the learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-II, Nawabshah for recording her statement and after recording her statement learned Judicial Magistrate is directed to pass appropriate orders in accordance with law. In the meantime, no harassment and no arrest shall be made of the persons nominated in above F.I.R. Copy of this order be communicated to the learned Magistrate for information and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
